name: checked_at
description: UTC timestamp when the health check ran

name: check_type
description: Type of check performed; one of row_count, gap_detection, schema_violation

name: route_id
description: Route scoped by the check; null for dataset-wide checks

name: result
description: Outcome of the check; one of pass or fail

name: detail
description: Human-readable description of the result (e.g. Expected 96 rows in last 24h, found 12)
